truncated_address.root_cause: PDF text extraction broke lines mid-address due to column width limits

examples: LaSalle II School Playground Drinking Fountain 1148 N HONORE ST
ON N WOOD ST FROM W BEACH AVE (1420 N) TO W JULIAN ST
street_range.root_cause: Range addresses (FROM/TO segments) need special street_segment grammar

program_allocation.root_cause: Not geographic projects - budget allocations for programs
